basic_details.short_information: CSIR-National Environmental Engineering Research Institute (CSIR-NEERI) Project Associate-I Notification 2026 has been released on the official website neeri.res.in. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the CSIR-NEERI Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E./B. Tech in Civil/Chemical from a recognized University
qualification.details: Project Associate-I: B.E./B. Tech in Civil/Chemical from a recognized University

salary_details.details: Rs. 31,000/- + HRA (NET/GATE qualified) or Rs. 25,000/- + HRA (others) Per Month
